verifier_readiness_summary: Ready for internal agency review. Two claims still need client confirmation before external presentation.

slides.title: Discovery Snapshot
bullets: The client has a clear service wedge but needs sharper proof points.
Messaging should prioritize outcome clarity over category education.
Sales enablement should focus on qualification friction and buyer confidence.

slides.title: Positioning Opportunity
bullets: Lead with the buyer's operational pain instead of internal product language.
Anchor differentiation in speed, implementation quality, and measurable handoff.
Use client-safe language that does not overstate market leadership.

slides.title: Open Inputs
slides.needs_input_reason: Confirm revenue impact claims and obtain permission to reference named customer examples.
bullets: Revenue lift needs direct client validation.
Named logos should remain internal until usage rights are confirmed.
Case study metrics should be replaced with ranges if exact values are sensitive.
